violations.description: Preventing contamination from equipment, utensils, and wiping cloths. — --Cloth for wiping food spills was not stored in sanitizing solution (at proper concentration) between uses. -Sani Bucket at main kitchen found at ~150ppm Quat. -Sani bucket at register found with less than 150ppm Quat.--Cloth or sanitizer solution for wiping food spills was not clean. -Sani Bucket at coffee station was cloudy.

Date marking and disposition of ready-to-eat potentially hazardous food. — --Refrigerated, ready-to-eat potentially hazardous food (prepared more than 24 hours ago) was not properly date marked. -Thawed egg patties in prep table were dated 10/31 and were not redated for thaw date. -Chopped chicken in garage refrigerator was not dated for thaw date.--Refrigerated, ready-to-eat potentially hazardous food was not consumed/discarded within 10 calendar days from the date of preparation. -Frosting in low refrigerator had date of 10/21.

Cleaning frequency of equipment and utensils. — --Nonfood contact surface was not cleaned as frequently as required. -Crumb/debris at bottom shelves of prep tables in kitchen and back prep areas. -Spill in bottom of 3 door refrigerator in garage.

Manual cleaning and sanitizing requirements. — --Sanitizer solution for three compartment sink was not maintained at the proper concentration. -Dishwasher found with 0ppm Chlorine. *SparChlor was empty. Restocked and primed while on-site, however, still was not able to get a 50ppm solution. *Must manually sanitize dishes until dishwasher is fixed/has correct 50ppm Chlorine solution.

Cleaning and maintenance of floors, walls and ceilings. — --New 2 door freezer plugged into extension cord plugged into uncovered outlet at ceiling in garage.--Physical facilities (e.g. floors, walls, ceiling etc. …) were not clean or not cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. -Dust/debris at filters above make line. -Damaged/dusty filter at vent above hand sink. -High dust a fan and corner above dish pit. -Dust build up on oscillating fan near mop sink. -Dust at wall vent near ice machine.

Storage and handling of maintenance items. — --Maintenance equipment, supplies and tools were not stored in a manner to protect against contamination of food, equipment, utensils, linens or single-service items. -Hose for sanitizer solution was laying in mop sink in contact with used/wet mop.--Wet-use maintenance items, such as mops, were not placed in a position that allows proper air-drying. -Wet mop left in mop sink-not hung to dry.
Method, clean, temp, concentration, exposure time, equipment/utensils sanitized 0/4, C STORAGE/HANDLING CLEAN EQUIPMENT AND UTENSILS 31 Clean dry location, protected (1 pt deducted)
Laundered, proper handling, and storage (1 pt deducted)
Design, construction, clean, maintained (1 pt deducted)
Cleaning frequency, maintained clean (1 pt deducted)
Method, clean, temp, concentration, exposure time, equipment/utensils sanitized (4 pts deducted)
